intent_tree: {"写一个Python程序，处理MP3音频文件并确认其清晰度": {"选择音频文件": {}, "加载音频文件并提取基本信息": {}, "生成波形图以分析振幅变化": {}, "生成频谱图以分析频率分布": {}, "计算量化指标（音量、信噪比、过零率）以评估音频质量": {}, "试听音频片段以人工确认清晰度": {}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "提示用户输入音频文件路径"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "检查音频文件是否存在"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "加载音频文件并提取基本信息（时长、声道数、采样率等）"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "生成波形图以显示振幅随时间的变化"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "生成频谱图以显示频率分布随时间的变化"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "计算平均音量（RMS能量）"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "估算信噪比以评估背景噪音水平"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "计算过零率以检测静音或噪声"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "输出音频质量分析结果到控制台"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "询问用户是否试听音频片段"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "播放前5秒音频供用户确认清晰度"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "inputPath"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "fileExists"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "audioLoaded"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "audioLoaded"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "audioLoaded"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node7", "type": "audioLoaded"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node8", "type": "audioLoaded"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node9", "type": "generateWaveform"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node9", "type": "generateSpectrogram"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node9", "type": "calculateVolume"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node9", "type": "estimateSNR"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "calculateZCR"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "displayResults"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "userConfirmation"}]}
